description.overview: The Redbone Coonhound is an even-tempered, mellow dog with a stunning red coat. They're versatile hunters and loving family dogs.
description.history: The Redbone Coonhound originated in United States.
description.temperament: Known for being even-tempered, amiable, eager.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, smooth coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The Redbone Coonhound is an even-tempered, mellow dog with a stunning red coat. They're versatile hunters and loving family dogs.
